request: code cho tôi 1 file code python khác print hello world

ai_plan.title: Add separate Python Hello World script
plan: Create a new Python file separate from the existing OpenCV camera script.
Implement a minimal main() function that prints "Hello, World!".
Provide a simple compile check command; no files are written until user approval.
ai_plan.summary: A new standalone Python file will be added at Project_Farm_Here/hello_world.py. Running it will print Hello, World! to the terminal.

file_changes.content:
"""Simple Hello World script for Farm_Robot.

Run:
    python Project_Farm_Here/hello_world.py
"""

from __future__ import annotations


def main() -> int:
    print("Hello, World!")
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
file_changes.reason: Add a separate Python script that prints Hello, World! without modifying the existing OpenCV camera file.
